title: gleicheniaceae
intro: The Gleicheniaceae is a family of plants, specifically a group of ferns that are characterized by their simple leaves and terminal sporangia. They are typically found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. This family of ferns is known for its diversity, with many species exhibiting unique features such as compound leaves and distinctive leaf shapes. The Gleicheniaceae family is a significant part of the global fern diversity, playing a vital role in various ecosystems.
